'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 77''' was the seventy-seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 18]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
*The [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]
*[[Petranaki arena|Geonosis Arena]] Beasts
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - [[Grand Convocation Chamber|Senate Chamber]]
*[[Hound-W2 SPD|Hound-W2 Scanning Patrol Detail]] (SPD)
*[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] Technology
*[[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class Frigate]]
